overall.description: A first-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza during a hazy orange dusk. The camera moves from beneath an elevated transit walkway through an open pedestrian plaza with digital signage, benches, and landscaped planters, concluding with a dramatic upward gaze toward a bright light source obscured by atmospheric haze.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated transit walkway in a futuristic urban environment. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk flanked by building walls on the right and support pillars on the left, with digital signage providing artificial illumination in the hazy atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a spacious open plaza dominated by a large central tree. The AVANTE building becomes visible on the right with its illuminated signage, while the wet pavement creates reflective surfaces. Silhouetted pedestrians walk along the distant railing to the left.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the AVANTE building, the scene features modern red benches where people sit and rest. The camera passes planters with palm trees and other vegetation lining the pedestrian path, while the AVANTE building recedes into the background.

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a landscaped garden with palm trees and metal grate walkways. The camera tilts upward to reveal a blindingly bright light source diffused through the orange haze, creating a dramatic silhouette of tree branches and street lamps against the glowing sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered depths of an urban transit corridor into a vast, hazy cyberpunk plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated walkway, moving along a concrete sidewalk where digital signage casts an artificial glow through the thick atmosphere. As the camera emerges from the cover, the space opens into a wide plaza featuring a large central tree and the illuminated AVANTE building, with wet pavement reflecting the orange dusk. The scene then shifts past modern red benches and landscaped planters filled with palm trees before gliding across metal grate walkways. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a blindingly bright light source diffused through the orange haze, silhouetting the surrounding branches and street lamps against the glowing sky.
